creator: rajil.s@gmail.com
text:
Hello,
I have webcamd-4.12.0.1 installed using pkg. I want to use it with Hauppauge HDPVR which seems to be supported using `hdpvr`. 

lsusb returns:

Bus /dev/usb Device /dev/ugen0.4: ID 2040:4903 Hauppauge HS PVR

webcamd -l returns:
webcamd [-d ugen0.4] -N AMBA-Hauppauge-HD-PVR -S 00A7C599 -M 0

webcamd however doesnt find it:
# webcamd -N AMBA-Hauppauge-HD-PVR -S 00A7C599 -M 0 
Attached to ugen0.4[0]
webcamd: Cannot find USB device

Any idea how to fix this?
